exercises.hindiScript: उसने पूछा, "तुम क्या कर रहे हो?"
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: She told me not to come here.
He asked if I was coming.

exercises.audioScript: He asked what I was doing.
exercises.hindiScript: उसने पूछा कि मैं क्या कर रहा था।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: She asked when I would come.
He asked what I was doing.
exercises.answer: He asked what I was doing.

exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: They asked if I was ready.

exercises.audioScript: The teacher told us to be quiet.
exercises.hindiScript: टीचर ने हमें चुप रहने को कहा।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: The doctor told me to take medicine.
The teacher told us to be quiet.
exercises.answer: The teacher told us to be quiet.

exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: He asked what I was doing.
He told me to do this work.

exercises.audioScript: She asked when I would come.
exercises.hindiScript: उसने पूछा कि मैं कब आऊँगा।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: He asked if I needed help.
She asked when I would come.
exercises.answer: She asked when I would come.

exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: The teacher told us to be quiet.
She told me not to come here.

exercises.audioScript: The doctor told me to take medicine.
exercises.hindiScript: डॉक्टर ने मुझे दवा लेने को कहा।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: He asked if I was coming.
The doctor told me to take medicine.
exercises.answer: The doctor told me to take medicine.

dictationPassage.text: He asked, "What are you doing?" He asked what I was doing. The teacher said, "Be quiet." The teacher told us to be quiet. She asked, "When will you come?"
dictationPassage.hindiTranslation: उसने पूछा, "तुम क्या कर रहे हो?" उसने पूछा कि मैं क्या कर रहा था। टीचर ने कहा, "चुप रहो।" टीचर ने हमें चुप रहने को कहा। उसने पूछा, "तुम कब आओगे?"
